title: EV Car Charger Installation
desc: We provide professional EV car charger installation services for homes and commercial properties across the GTA. Our licensed electricians install Level 2 charging stations safely and in compliance with electrical codes, ensuring reliable and efficient charging for your electric vehicle. Whether you‚Äôre upgrading your garage or adding charging stations for a commercial space, we deliver clean, dependable installations with fast turnaround times.

## EV Car Charger Installation Services

Electric vehicles (EVs) are growing in popularity across Toronto, making reliable home charging more important than ever. While standard 120V outlets can take 10‚Äì20 hours for a full charge, they are often too slow for everyday use.

‚Äã

QuickFast specializes in Level 2 EV charger installations, which use a 240V connection to significantly reduce charging time‚Äîoften completing a full charge in as little as 4‚Äì8 hours, depending on the vehicle. This makes home charging faster, more convenient, and better suited for daily driving needs.

‚Äã

Level 2 chargers are widely recommended for regular use and help support efficient, long-term battery performance. Installing one also prepares your home for the future of electric transportation.

‚Äã

We accept credit cards for your convenience.

[INQUIRE TODAY](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

![red gas flame.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_2571db33ea79499fb082b37bc9f07904~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1024,h_346,al_c,q_80,enc_avif,quality_auto/824e75_2571db33ea79499fb082b37bc9f07904~mv2.jpg)

## Level 2 EV Charger Installation

Before installing your Level 2 EV charger, QuickFast will assess whether your home can support an additional 240V connection. In some cases‚Äîespecially in older homes‚Äîelectrical upgrades may be required, such as panel upgrades or service capacity improvements to ensure safe and reliable performance.

\
Depending on your location, rebates or incentives may be available to help offset installation costs, so it‚Äôs worth checking with local programs.

\
No garage? No problem. Level 2 chargers are designed for year-round outdoor use and can be safely installed in driveways or laneways, providing convenient charging regardless of your home setup.

![Electric Car](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_1193cce1e40046b59e3bcf3192ea4440~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_470,h_433,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_1193cce1e40046b59e3bcf3192ea4440~mv2.jpg)

![Electric Vehicle Charging](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_4e99c464e51c4c45a9d0ccbc14ebf500~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_470,h_440,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_4e99c464e51c4c45a9d0ccbc14ebf500~mv2.jpeg)

## How to Choose the Best EV Charger for Your Home

QuickFast installs Level 2 EV chargers but does not supply the units, so here are a few tips to help you choose the right one.

‚Äã

Level 2 chargers operate on 240V, similar to an electric stove or clothes dryer. Most residential models range from 16 to 40 amps, with higher amperage allowing for faster charging‚Äîprovided your electrical system can support it.

‚Äã

When selecting a charger, consider your parking setup and the distance between your vehicle‚Äôs charging port and the installation point. Charging cables typically range from 15 to 25 feet, so ensure you choose a length that comfortably fits your space and allows easy access without strain.

![red gas flame.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_2571db33ea79499fb082b37bc9f07904~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1024,h_397,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/824e75_2571db33ea79499fb082b37bc9f07904~mv2.jpg)

## Home Electric Car Charger Installation

A home EV charger offers a convenient and efficient way to power your electric vehicle right at your doorstep. Unlike public charging stations, it allows you to charge overnight or during the day without leaving your property. Level 2 chargers are the most popular choice for residential use, offering significantly faster charging compared to standard 120V outlets.

‚Äã

Installing a home EV charger can also add value to your property while supporting a more sustainable lifestyle by reducing reliance on fossil fuels. When choosing a charger, consider charging speed, vehicle compatibility, installation requirements, and smart features such as remote monitoring and scheduling.

‚Äã

QuickFast provides professional EV charger installation services across Toronto, ensuring a safe, reliable, and seamless charging experience for your home.

## Tesla Wall Charger Installation

QuickFast provides professional Tesla Wall Connector installation services across Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). Our team performs a full assessment of your home‚Äôs electrical system to ensure it can safely support a Level 2 charging setup, along with any necessary upgrades if required.

‚Äã

The Tesla Wall Connector offers fast, reliable home charging, making it easy to power your vehicle overnight or throughout the day. With expert installation, you benefit from improved convenience, optimized charging performance, and added property value.

‚Äã

Trust QuickFast for safe, efficient, and seamless Tesla wall charger installation tailored to your home and electrical system.
